title: Name of instance inside "for" loop clashes with name of an instance located outside of the loop scope

features.name: for loop with module instantiation and duplicate name outside loop
features.description: Code should include a for loop containing a module instantiation with an instance name, and another module instantiation with the same name outside the loop body
features.snippet:
for (int i = 0; i < 1; i++) begin mymodule inst_name(); end
mymodule inst_name();

features.name: generate-like loop with instance declaration clashing with outer scope
features.description: Code should include a generate-style for loop with a module instantiation declaring an instance name that also exists at the outer scope
